query:
INSERT INTO blender_version
            (
            id,
            is_default,
            custom_name,
            url,
            app,
            version,
            series,
            risk_id,
            branch,
            patch,
            patch_url,
            hash,
            hash_url,
            platform,
            architecture,
            bitness,
            file_mtime,
            file_name,
            file_size,
            file_extension,
            release_cycle,
            checksum,
            installation_directory_path,
            executable_file_path,
            blender_installation_location_id,
            download_status_type_id,
            created,
            modified
            ) VALUES ( 
            ?,
            ?,
            ?,
            ?,
            ?,
            ?,
            ?,
            ?,
            ?,
            ?,
            ?,
            ?,
            ?,
            ?,
            ?,
            ?,
            ?,
            ?,
            ?,
            ?,
            ?,
            ?,
            ?,
            ?,
            ?,
            ?,
            ?,
            ?
            ) 
            ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING
